history_text: 45-year-old female with a 7-year history of Type 2 diabetes mellitus, currently poorly controlled (HbA1c 9.2%). Comorbidities include hyperlipidaemia, obesity, T2DM with hyperglycaemia. Renal function is mildly to moderately reduced (eGFR 66.1 mL/min/1.73m²). Current medications include Metformin XR 750mg once daily, Empagliflozin 10mg once daily, Amlodipine 5mg once daily. No known drug allergies. She denies recent hospitalisations or surgical procedures.
